title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss their adoption of AI coding tools at scale, including workflow changes, productivity measurement, and advice for other organizations. Key observations include engineers spending only 15% of time coding at Atlassian and small teams delivering accelerated roadmaps.
